name: v1alpha1RepoCreds
description: v1alpha1RepoCreds schema from Argo CD API

azureActiveDirectoryEndpoint.name: AzureActiveDirectoryEndpoint specifies the Azure Active Directory endpoint used for Service Principal authentication. If empty will default to https://login.microsoftonline.com

azureServicePrincipalClientId.name: AzureServicePrincipalClientId specifies the client ID of the Azure Service Principal used to access the repo

azureServicePrincipalClientSecret.name: AzureServicePrincipalClientSecret specifies the client secret of the Azure Service Principal used to access the repo

azureServicePrincipalTenantId.name: AzureServicePrincipalTenantId specifies the tenant ID of the Azure Service Principal used to access the repo

bearerToken.name: BearerToken contains the bearer token used for Git BitBucket Data Center auth at the repo server

enableOCI.name: EnableOCI specifies whether helm-oci support should be enabled for this repo

forceHttpBasicAuth.name: ForceHttpBasicAuth specifies whether Argo CD should attempt to force basic auth for HTTP connections

gcpServiceAccountKey.name: GCPServiceAccountKey specifies the service account key in JSON format to be used for getting credentials to Google Cloud Source repos

githubAppEnterpriseBaseUrl.name: GithubAppEnterpriseBaseURL specifies the GitHub API URL for GitHub app authentication. If empty will default to https://api.github.com

githubAppID.name: GithubAppId specifies the Github App ID of the app used to access the repo for GitHub app authentication

githubAppInstallationID.name: GithubAppInstallationId specifies the ID of the installed GitHub App for GitHub app authentication

githubAppPrivateKey.name: GithubAppPrivateKey specifies the private key PEM data for authentication via GitHub app

insecureOCIForceHttp.description: InsecureOCIForceHttp specifies whether the connection to the repository uses TLS at _all_. If true, no TLS. This flag is applicable for OCI repos only.

noProxy.name: NoProxy specifies a list of targets where the proxy isn't used, applies only in cases where the proxy is applied

password.name: Password for authenticating at the repo server

proxy.name: Proxy specifies the HTTP/HTTPS proxy used to access repos at the repo server

sshPrivateKey.name: SSHPrivateKey contains the private key data for authenticating at the repo server using SSH (only Git repos)

tlsClientCertData.name: TLSClientCertData specifies the TLS client cert data for authenticating at the repo server

tlsClientCertKey.name: TLSClientCertKey specifies the TLS client cert key for authenticating at the repo server

type.description: Type specifies the type of the repoCreds. Can be either "git", "helm" or "oci". "git" is assumed if empty or absent.

url.name: URL is the URL to which these credentials match

useAzureWorkloadIdentity.name: UseAzureWorkloadIdentity specifies whether to use Azure Workload Identity for authentication

username.name: Username for authenticating at the repo server
